title: Whisper STT — speech-to-text input via faster-whisper
what_failed: Pi has no speech input. All input is keyboard-only. Phase 8 goal is voice-first interface.
fix_applied: tools/tools_stt.py: STTTools with transcribe_file(path) and transcribe_mic(seconds). Lazy model load via _get_model() singleton (faster-whisper, default base.en, auto-promotes to cuda+float16 if GPU available). Seconds clamped [1,120]. listen + transcribe_file wired into agent/tools.py dispatch and get_tool_definitions(). STT_MODEL env var for model size override.
